title: Cobblers & Gunners
description: Modpack containing Create, Cobblemon, TaCZ and cool addons for those.
body:
This modpack is built around three core mods: Cobblemon, Create, and TaCZ, all enhanced with carefully selected addons and complementary mods. Whether you love designing intricate machinery, training powerful creatures, or gearing up with advanced weaponry, this modpack offers a balanced and engaging experience for all playstyles.

## Key Features

### Cobblemon
Experience the joy of catching, training, and battling Pokémons across your Minecraft world. With addons introducing new mechanics and more than 1000 species, there’s always something new to discover. Build a team of companions, train them for battle, and explore the world in search of rare and unique creatures.

### TaCZ
Equip yourself with an arsenal of advanced weaponry, from firearms to futuristic gear, designed to give combat a modern edge. Additional tech mods integrate seamlessly, offering expanded functionality and enhancing your survival against tougher challenges.

### Create
Harness the power of engineering to build incredible contraptions and automate your world. Create intricate machines using gears, conveyor belts, and other mechanical components, and unlock even more possibilities with addons that add new blocks, tools, and functionalities.

## Additional Features

### Integrated Gameplay
The mods and addons have been carefully curated to work together seamlessly, providing a smooth and cohesive experience as you switch between engineering, adventuring, and combat.

### Quality-of-Life Improvements
Includes enhancements such as a map system and performance optimizations to keep gameplay fluid and enjoyable.

### Customization and Replayability
With such a wide range of tools, creatures, and mechanics to explore, this modpack ensures no two playthroughs will feel the same. Tackle challenges your way, whether by creating vast automated factories, assembling the ultimate Cobblemon team, or mastering advanced weaponry.

Perfect for players who enjoy blending creativity, exploration, and innovation, this modpack invites you to build, battle, and explore like never before in Minecraft!
